content:
🔥 whisperbot | C
🎯 Primary Use Case: Transcribing Telegram voice messages into text automatically.
✨ Key Features: • Transcribes audio messages from Telegram using whisper.cpp or qwen-asr • Handles audio downloading and conversion to WAV • Streams transcription results back to Telegram as they are generated • Manages ASR processing queue to balance latency and throughput • Dynamically switches between faster and better ASR models based on queue length
📖 Summary: Whisperbot is a Telegram bot written in C that transcribes audio messages into text using either whisper.cpp or qwen-asr as the backend. It handles audio conversion, transcription processing, and streams the text back to the user, with options for managing queue length and model selection for performance.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
